name: create-pipedrive-app
description: Scaffold and extend Pipedrive Marketplace integration projects from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Build Pipedrive Marketplace apps from Codex
interface.longDescription: Scaffold new Pipedrive Marketplace integration projects, add OAuth, add iframe App Extensions, call the Pipedrive API, and review Marketplace readiness from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Scaffold a new Pipedrive Marketplace app.
Add OAuth to this Pipedrive app.
Review this app for Marketplace readiness.
